element.description: Circled numeral '4' marking a vertical post/member at the eave edge, below the roof slope
Vertical dimension line labeled 'ระยะตามแบบแปลนสถาปัตย์ ประมาณ ±1.30 ม.' (approximate, per architectural plan) running down beside the post, from roof edge to a lower reference point

warnings: This is eave/fascia detail R1, referenced elsewhere as 'เชิงชาย 1 (R1)'.

The vertical circled letter 'B' at the bottom of this detail is the same grid letter used elsewhere on this house (main building gridline B, per the master grid file) — but only ONE axis letter appears on this local detail box, so I cannot independently confirm from this sheet alone whether it is being used as a true structural gridline tie or just a local section-reference letter; treating it as plausible-but-unconfirmed, consistent with t2's earlier caution on this same point.

Independent re-read for Gen 4/t3: my reading matches t2's prior extraction closely on all material callouts and the 1.50 m overhang; my transcription of the small vertical annotation text differs slightly from t2's ('ระยะตามแบบแปลนสถาปัตย์' vs t2's 'ระยะตามแนวเสาโครงไม้') — both agree the text is only partially legible and low confidence, so this is noted as a genuine reading discrepancy on a low-confidence field, not a correction.
Sibling detail R2 is in _หน้า14_eave_r2.json.
